message:
feat(fwc): add OS keychain backend for credential storage with encrypted-file fallback

Prefer the native OS keychain (Apple Keychain, Windows Credential Manager,
Linux Secret Service) for storing connector credentials via the `keyring`
crate. Falls back to the existing ChaCha20-Poly1305 encrypted file when no
keychain is available. A synthetic index entry (__fwc_index__) tracks stored
connector IDs for enumeration since OS keychains don't support listing.

Includes KeychainClient trait abstraction, BackendPreference enum,
MockKeychainClient for testing, and 3 new integration tests covering
keychain operations, index management, and fallback behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
